product_overview: A React + Vite frontend for an ISP management system providing dashboard, customer management, authentication, and finance views. The app renders secured pages and interacts with backend APIs to list customers, show invoices, and manage user sessions.
core_goals: Provide a secure, role-aware dashboard for ISP operators to monitor system health and key metrics.
Allow authenticated users to view and manage customers (list, view profile, onboarding).
Support secure authentication flows and session handling with clear error handling and redirects to login.
Expose finance and billing data (overview and invoices) to authorized users.
Keep the UI responsive and modular using React + Vite + TailwindCSS and leverage existing page routes.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Render the login UI and support user sign-in to obtain session tokens used to access protected pages.
user_flows: GET /login -> Receive 200 with login form -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT access token and refresh token -> GET / with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with dashboard data

GET /login -> Receive 200 with login form -> POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized with error message -> GET /login -> Receive 200 with login form including error feedback

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main authenticated landing page showing top-level metrics, quick actions, and links into customer and finance sections.
user_flows: GET / with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with dashboard metrics and links -> GET /customers with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with customers list
GET / without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /login -> Receive 200 with login page

features.name: Customers Management
features.description: List customers, view individual customer profiles and progress through onboarding steps.
user_flows: GET /customers with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with customers list -> GET /customers/{customerId} with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with customer profile data -> GET /customers/{customerId}/onboarding with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with onboarding status
GET /customers with expired Authorization token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /login -> Receive 200 with login page

features.name: Finance
features.description: Show finance overview and invoice listings for bill management and review.
user_flows: GET /finance with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with finance overview (balances, due amounts) -> GET /finance/invoices with Authorization: Bearer <valid-token> -> Receive 200 with invoices list
GET /finance without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized -> GET /login -> Receive 200 with login page

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard of the ISP system
